Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the inventory. Can be a parent product or a child variant (unit).

name.description: Name of the product (e.g., 'Coca-Cola 12oz Can' or 'Coca-Cola - 12-pack').

additionalDescription.description: Optional additional details or specifications about the product.

isSerialized.description: Whether the product's base units require individual serial number tracking.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit for this specific product variant (e.g., 'piece', 'pack').

stock.description: Current total quantity of this product variant in stock.

price.description: The selling price for this product variant.

cost.description: The cost for this product variant.

sku.description: The SKU for this specific product variant.

barcode.description: The barcode (UPC) for this specific product variant.

parentId.description: If this is a child product, this is the ID of the parent product.

conversionFactor.description: If a child, how many base units it contains. For a parent, this is 1.

SerialNumber.title: SerialNumber
SerialNumber.description: Represents a unique serial number for a specific product unit.

productId.description: The ID of the product this serial number belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the serialized item.

dateAdded.description: When the serial number was added to the inventory.

saleId.description: The ID of the sales transaction when the item was sold.

id.description: Unique identifier for the sales transaction.

invoiceDate.description: Date and time of the invoice.

dueDate.description: Date and time the payment is due.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, cash).

productIds.description: References to Products. (Relationship: SalesTransaction N:N Product)

InventoryAlert.title: InventoryAlert
InventoryAlert.description: Represents an alert for low inventory levels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory alert.

alertDate.description: Date when the alert was triggered.

alertLevel.description: Quantity of stock remaining at the time the alert was triggered.

RestockSuggestion.title: RestockSuggestion
RestockSuggestion.description: Represents a restock suggestion generated by AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the restock suggestion.

suggestionDate.description: Date when the restock suggestion was generated.

reason.description: Reasoning behind the restock suggestion, based on sales trends.

customerId.description: Reference to the customer who placed the order.

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order.

total.description: The total amount of the order.

items.description: The items included in the order.

StockAdjustment.title: StockAdjustment
StockAdjustment.description: Represents a manual adjustment to a product's stock level.

id.description: Unique identifier for the stock adjustment.

productId.description: The ID of the product being adjusted.

quantity.description: The amount the stock was adjusted by (can be positive or negative).

reason.description: The reason for the adjustment (e.g., 'New shipment', 'Damaged goods').

date.description: The date and time of the adjustment.

newStock.description: The resulting stock level after the adjustment.

paymentTerms.description: Payment terms for the customer (e.g., Net 30, Due on receipt).

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment method.

UnitOfMeasure.title: UnitOfMeasure
UnitOfMeasure.description: Represents a unit of measure for a product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the unit of measure.

name.description: Name of the unit of measure (e.g., piece, box).

abbreviation.description: Abbreviation for the unit of measure (e.g., pc, bx).

permissions.description: A list of permissions granted to the user.

definition.description: Stores product brands. All authenticated users can list brands.
Stores product categories.  All authenticated users can list categories.
Stores product subcategories. All authenticated users can list subcategories.
Stores all product variants, both parent and child units.
Stores unique serial numbers for each unit of a serialized product.
Stores a log of all manual stock adjustments for a product. Any authenticated user can list adjustments across all products.

params.name: productId
params.description: The ID of the product being adjusted.

params.name: adjustmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the stock adjustment record.

params.name: salesTransactionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the sales transaction.

params.name: inventoryAlertId
params.description: Unique identifier for the inventory alert.

definition.description: Stores restock suggestions generated by AI.

params.name: restockSuggestionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the restock suggestion.

definition.description: Stores customer information. All authenticated users can list customers.
Stores available payment methods. All authenticated users can list payment methods.

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: Unique identifier for the payment method.

definition.description: Stores available units of measure. All authenticated users can list units of measure.

params.name: unitOfMeasureId
params.description: Unique identifier for the unit of measure.

firestore.reasoning: Reverted to a classic parent-child model within a single 'products' collection. Each document is a product variant. Child products have a 'parentId' and a 'conversionFactor' to relate them to their base product, simplifying the data structure and removing the need for a separate 'productUnits' collection.
